verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Must Jesus bear the cross alone, And all the world go free? No, there’s a cross for every one, And there’s a cross for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The consecrated cross I’ll bear, Till death shall set me free, And then go home my crown to wear, For there’s a crown for me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Upon the crystal pavement, down At Jesus’ pierced feet, With joy I’ll cast my golden crown, And His dear name repeat.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: O precious cross! O glorious crown! O resurrection day! Ye angels from the stars come down and bear my soul away.
